Class CategoryDiscount

java.lang.Object
discount.Discount
discount.CategoryDiscount
Direct Known Subclasses:
CategoryFixedPercentage, CategoryGift, CategoryQuantity, CategoryVolume
public abstract class CategoryDiscount extends Discount
It implements the general discount for those with Category coverage
See Also:

  • StoreProduct

    • CategoryDiscount

      public CategoryDiscount(String assignedId, DiscountType assignedType, DiscountCoverage assignedCoverage, LocalDateTime assignedStartDate, LocalDateTime assignedEndDate)
      A Category discount's general constructor
      Parameters:
      assignedId - the discount's id
      assignedType - the discount's type
      assignedCoverage - the discount's coverage
      assignedStartDate - the discount's start date
      assignedEndDate - the discount's end date

      Parameters:
      assignedType - the discount's type
      assignedCoverage - the discount's coverage
      assignedStartDate - the discount's start date
      endDate - the discount's end date

    • addCategories

      public void addCategories(Category... newCategories) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It adds categories to the discount
      Parameters:
      newCategories - the desired categories
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the desired discount was conflicting
